libraries.title: Libraries
libraries.description: Manage your reusable prompts and image collections.
libraries.searchPlaceholder: Search libraries by name or ID...

noLibraries.title: No libraries yet
noLibraries.description: Create one to store reusable prompts or images.

libraries.pinLimitReached: You can pin at most {{max}} libraries.

duplicateDialog.title: Duplicate Library
duplicateDialog.description: Create a copy of this library with a new name.

libraryEditor.emptyDescription: Add content below to initialize library

references.title: Library In Use
references.message_one: "{{name}}" is referenced by {{count}} project. You need to remove these references before deleting.
references.message_other: "{{name}}" is referenced by {{count}} projects. You need to remove these references before deleting.

deleteLibrary.title: Delete Library
deleteLibrary.message: This will permanently delete the collection "{{name}}" and all its fragments. This action is irreversible.

expungeFragment.title: Expunge Fragment
expungeFragment.message: Are you sure you want to remove this fragment from the collection?

deleteSelected.title: Delete Selected Fragments
deleteSelected.message: Are you sure you want to delete {{count}} fragment(s)?

exportModal.title: Export Library
exportModal.description: Confirm the ZIP filename before downloading this library.

libraryImportExport.title: Import & Output
libraryImportExport.description: Bulk load prompt fragments, preserve tags in output, and keep a clean import format for editing outside the app.

importSource.label: Import Source
importSource.title: Compose incoming library items
importSource.description: Supports the legacy list format and a new tag-aware variant:
importSource.sharedTagsPlaceholder: Applied to every imported item. Example: evergreen, short-form
importSource.textareaPlaceholder:
Paste list items here.

- Subject: Moody editorial portrait | tags: cinematic, portrait
- Soft rim light with shallow depth of field
- Product close-up: Frosted bottle on stone | tags: product, studio

formatGuide.title: Format Guide
formatGuide.rule1: Each item must start with `- ` so the parser can split entries predictably.
formatGuide.rule2: Use `Title: Content` when you want a display title. Use `| tags: a, b` at the end when you want per-item tags.
formatGuide.rule3: Shared tags above are merged into every parsed item and deduplicated automatically.

parseStatus.title: Parse Status
parseStatus.valid: All non-empty lines are valid import entries.

parseIssues.missingContentBeforeTags: Missing content before the tags segment
parseIssues.missingContentAfterTitle: Missing content after the title separator

preview.label: Import Preview
preview.title: Review incoming tagged items
preview.description: Parsed items show exactly what will be created in this text library.
preview.emptyDescription: Add list items on the left and this panel will render the exact import result, including merged tags.

output.label: Library Output
output.title: Export current items with or without tags
output.description: Tagged output preserves text library metadata. Plain output keeps the original minimal list format.

libraryForm.descriptionPlaceholder: Explain what this library contains and when it should be used.
libraryForm.descriptionHelp: Optional. Shown on cards, profile, and MCP tools.
libraryForm.typeDescription: Choose the media family this library will store before creating it.

libraryCleanup.title: Clean Up References
libraryCleanup.description: Remove references to "{{name}}" from projects before deleting.
libraryCleanup.warningDesc: Remove references individually or use the button below to clean all and delete.
libraryCleanup.allClearedDesc: You can now safely delete this library.

confirm.title: Clean All & Delete
confirm.message: This will remove all references to "{{name}}" from {{count}} project and permanently delete the library. This action is irreversible.
confirm.message_plural: This will remove all references to "{{name}}" from {{count}} projects and permanently delete the library. This action is irreversible.
